title: Our Family's First Vegan Hot Pot Night

all.en: After my older sister adopted a vegan diet, our weekly hot pot tradition felt complicated.
all.zh: 在我姐姐改採純素飲食後，我們每週的火鍋傳統變得有些棘手。

all.en: For years, we had always gathered around a bubbling pot of pork bone broth on Sundays.
all.zh: 多年來，我們週日總是圍坐在一鍋翻滾的豬骨湯旁。

all.en: My mother worried that without meat, the soup would feel empty and unsatisfying.
all.zh: 媽媽擔心沒有肉，湯頭會變得空虛而不夠滿足。

all.en: My sister gently suggested that we try one full vegan hot pot night together.
all.zh: 姐姐溫和地建議我們一起試試一整晚的純素火鍋。

all.en: She promised to handle the broth, shopping, and most of the cooking preparations.
all.zh: 她承諾會負責湯頭、採購和大部分的烹飪準備工作。

all.en: On Saturday morning, we drove to a large traditional market on the south side of town.
all.zh: 週六早上，我們開車到鎮南邊的一個大型傳統市場。

all.en: My sister bought fresh mushrooms, leafy greens, lotus root, and three kinds of tofu.
all.zh: 姐姐買了新鮮的菇類、葉菜、蓮藕和三種豆腐。

all.en: She also picked up dried kelp, dried tomatoes, and a small bag of red dates.
all.zh: 她也買了乾海帶、番茄乾和一小袋紅棗。

all.en: My father followed her around the stalls, asking quiet questions about every choice.
all.zh: 爸爸跟著她在攤位間走動，安靜地詢問她每一個選擇的原因。

all.en: He admitted he had never paid much attention to vegetables before this weekend.
all.zh: 他承認在這個週末之前，自己從來沒有真正注意過蔬菜。

all.en: Back home, my sister simmered kelp and mushrooms for almost two hours in a large pot.
all.zh: 回到家後，姐姐在大鍋中熬煮海帶和菇類將近兩個小時。

all.en: The kitchen filled with a deep, earthy aroma that reminded me of forest rain.
all.zh: 廚房裡瀰漫著深邃、樸實的香氣，讓我想起森林裡的雨味。

all.en: She added red dates, ginger slices, and a few pieces of dried tomato for sweetness.
all.zh: 她加入紅棗、薑片和幾片番茄乾以增添甘甜。

all.en: My younger brother peeked into the pot and made a doubtful face at the dark broth.
all.zh: 弟弟探頭看了一眼鍋子，對著深色的湯頭做出懷疑的表情。

all.en: He whispered to me that he had secretly hidden a small pack of beef jerky upstairs.
all.zh: 他偷偷對我說，他在樓上藏了一小包牛肉乾。

all.en: I told him to give the vegan dinner a real chance before making any judgments.
all.zh: 我告訴他在下任何結論之前，要真正給這頓素食晚餐一個機會。

all.en: By six o'clock, the dining table was crowded with colorful plates of fresh vegetables.
all.zh: 六點時，餐桌上擺滿了色彩繽紛的新鮮蔬菜盤。

all.en: My sister had arranged everything beautifully, like a magazine photo shoot.
all.zh: 姐姐把每樣東西擺得很漂亮，像雜誌的攝影作品。

all.en: We lit the portable stove, and the broth slowly began to bubble with a gentle sound.
all.zh: 我們點燃卡式爐，湯頭慢慢開始發出柔和的沸騰聲。

all.en: My father took the first bite, dipping a piece of tofu in a homemade sesame sauce.
all.zh: 爸爸夾起第一口，把一塊豆腐沾上自製的芝麻醬。

all.en: He chewed slowly, then nodded with genuine surprise written across his entire face.
all.zh: 他慢慢咀嚼，然後點點頭，整張臉寫滿了真心的驚訝。

all.en: My mother tried the lotus root next and admitted that the broth had a wonderful depth.
all.zh: 媽媽接著嘗試了蓮藕，並承認湯頭有著極佳的深度。

all.en: My younger brother stayed quiet at first, watching everyone else from across the table.
all.zh: 弟弟一開始保持沉默，從桌子對面觀察每一個人。

all.en: Eventually, hunger won, and he carefully placed a few mushrooms into his bowl.
all.zh: 最後，飢餓戰勝了他，他小心地把幾朵菇放進自己的碗裡。

all.en: He took a tiny bite, paused, then took a much bigger one without saying a word.
all.zh: 他咬了一小口，停頓了一下，然後沒說一句話又咬了一大口。

all.en: Within twenty minutes, he was reaching for seconds and even thirds of crispy tofu skin.
all.zh: 二十分鐘內，他已經在夾第二份、甚至第三份酥脆的豆皮了。

all.en: My sister smiled quietly, clearly proud but choosing not to make a big deal of it.
all.zh: 姐姐安靜地微笑，顯然很自豪，但選擇不大張旗鼓地炫耀。

all.en: We talked about work, school, and old family memories long into the warm evening.
all.zh: 我們聊著工作、學校和家族往日的回憶，一直聊到溫暖的夜晚。

all.en: My father said the meal had felt lighter, but not lacking in any meaningful way.
all.zh: 爸爸說這頓飯感覺更清爽，卻沒有絲毫缺少重要味道的感覺。

all.en: My mother began to plan future meatless meals, jotting ideas onto a small notepad.
all.zh: 媽媽開始規劃未來的無肉餐點，在小筆記本上記下各種想法。

all.en: When the broth finally cooled, my brother quietly admitted that he liked it very much.
all.zh: 當湯頭終於冷卻時，弟弟悄悄承認他非常喜歡這頓飯。

all.en: He never mentioned the beef jerky hidden upstairs and probably forgot about it entirely.
all.zh: 他從未再提起樓上藏著的牛肉乾，可能已經完全忘記了。

all.en: My sister hugged each of us before leaving for her apartment across the city.
all.zh: 姐姐在離開回到城市另一頭的公寓前，擁抱了我們每一個人。

all.en: She thanked us for trying something new without complaining or making her feel awkward.
all.zh: 她感謝我們嘗試新事物，沒有抱怨，也沒有讓她感到尷尬。

all.en: That night, our family agreed that vegan Sundays would become a regular new tradition.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我們全家一致同意純素週日將成為一個固定的新傳統。
